description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular black metal head with flat striking faces on both ends. The head is solid and blocky, designed for delivering powerful blows, and appears to be made of dense steel or iron. The handle is long, cylindrical, and colored brown, likely constructed from wood or a composite material, providing leverage for two-handed use. The handle is straight and smooth, with no visible ergonomic enhancements or grip textures. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the head or handle. The hammer appears clean and unused, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or damage.
description: A large sledgehammer with a black rectangular metal head and a long, straight brown handle. The design is simple, sturdy, and utilitarian, with no visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brown handle and the rectangular black head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the circular cross-section of the handle and the flat face of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full handle and the rectangular head from the other side.
description_view_3: View from the top of the head, showing the handle entering the center and the flat striking surface.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, rectangular block shape, dual flat striking faces, no claws or peens
